title: R.E.P.O. Love Potion
description: Adds the love potion and "I Love" song from the popular game: R.E.P.O, along with extra mechanics.
body:
**Mod Release Trailer**  

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/D2wtIAFWa5o" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

## R.E.P.O. Love Potion Mod

> **Make lovely compliments to your friends with the heavily R.E.P.O.-inspired Love Potion, or jam out to the remix “I Love” disc as the air fills with love.**

---

**Love Potion**  
Adds a love-themed effect that changes gameplay in small but fun ways:

- **Overlay for love effect:** Blocks closer to the blast take more damage.
- **Gameplay features:** Makes the potion more worthwhile to craft and adds extra fun.
1. Creepers will avoid players under the potion’s effect and only explode when provoked.
2. Crops on farmland will grow slightly faster while a player with the love effect is nearby.
3. Mobs have a small chance to enter breeding mode near players with the love effect.
4. Players will periodically play a “yippee” sound effect while under the love effect.
- **Words of love:** Adds all the same exact sentence combinations between the user and a nearby player or potion. A few Minecraft-specific ones were also added, totaling **1,727,306** possible combinations.

![Example of the love potion.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5da26e262a8facf98bdb4b343f98693434daf890.png)

---

**Config System**  
Control how the overlay works:

- **Disable overlay** if you find it intrusive.  
- **Adjust overlay opacity** for further customization.  

---

**I Love Remix Music Disc**  
Spawns flowers to spread the love (**ONLY IF THE JUKEBOX IS ON TOP OF DIRT**). The flowers will also spawn love particles, filling the air with love.

![Music disc in a forest with love particles.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c4a6a8a26a3de45c39bbda7558d20a2d260a192.png)

---

**Gamerule Support**  
Enable or disable flower spawning to suit your needs:

- `/gamerule SpawnFlowersNearILoveDisc true|false` → Turns spawning on or off.

---

**Credits**  
Special thanks to:

- “I Love Remix” by goldensurfer — [Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BDHCMtBRjgw)
